---
title: "Hi, I'm Jack"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: assets/about/images/profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: twitter-x
      text: "X"
      href: https://x.com/jackhau0212
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/jackhau0212
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jackhau/
---

Hi, I am Jack. I am an AI software engineer at G-Research. I am interested in AI, ML, robotics, and sports.

## Education

Imperial College London | London, UK
MSc in Artificial Intelligence | Sep 2023 - Sep 2024

University of College London | London, UK
MEng in Mechanical Engineering | Sep 2019 - Jun 2023

## Experience

G-Research | Generative AI Software Engineer | Jan 2025 - present

G-Research | AI Software Engineer Intern | May 2024 - Sep 2024
